description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Introduces output color(s) [2] and removes input color(s) [1, 9]. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_fafffa47(I):
    x1 = tophalf(I)
    x2 = bottomhalf(I)
    x3 = shape(x2)
    x4 = ofcolor(x1, ZERO)
    x5 = ofcolor(x2, ZERO)
    x6 = intersection(x4, x5)
    x7 = canvas(ZERO, x3)
    O = fill(x7, TWO, x6)
    return O
